---
title: Valentina Salcedo
image: media/fotopirano.jpg
toc: false
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 18em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/valentinasalcedo/
      target: _blank
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:valentinasalcedo14@gmail.com
      target: _blank
---

## About me

I'm Valentina, I'm a journalist based in Trieste and freelance writer. I currently write for TheAmerican Magazine and LiveInItaly creative columns on culture and local life- As local as an outsider can be. I'm also a Master Student in International Marketing, Management and Organisation at the University of Udine.

I have written publications for Conexion Externado, El Pais, and InTrieste Magazine. I've also won the International Women's Writing Competition Citta di Trieste. Between the Bachelor and the editorial articles, I have traveled the world from Colombia to USA, and then Spain, Italy and Germany. Now, I am part of the Social Media Team in the Starting Finance Local section.

When I'm not writing, you will find me in a running club, joining a hiking, or taking pictures of a nice coffee.

If you would like to get in touch, you can contact me by [email](mailto:valentinasalcedo14@gmail.com). I'm also on Linkedin and MuckRack.
